summary: Diff implements rich cell content utilities and editor components to support text+images in table/match-pairs cells, updates theme tokens for a white sidebar and lighter purple accents, and adds data normalization for backward compatibility. However, table sizing rules (equal column widths and row-based equal heights) and explicit print/PDF-safe layout controls are not evidenced in the provided diff summary. Several unrelated wireframe/feature updates (AI/OCR/undo-redo/etc.) also appear beyond the BuildRequest scope.

missing_requirements.requirement: Enforce table sizing rules: all columns must have equal width across the table; within each row, all cells must share the same height (row-based equal heights), while different rows may have different heights.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows rich cell rendering/editing and theme updates, but does not show any table layout CSS/logic enforcing equal column widths and row-based equal heights in editor or print output. PaperRenderer changes shown focus on rendering rich content, not table sizing constraints.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure print-safe PDF rendering for tables/match-pairs containing inline images and captions, including proper wrapping/clipping behavior and predictable sizing for A4 print output; and no print-only UI controls appear in printed output.
missing_requirements.reason: While PaperSurface includes some print classes (e.g., print:max-w-none, print:shadow-none), the diff summary does not show explicit print CSS/rules for table/match-pairs cells to prevent overflow in print, nor evidence of hiding editor-only controls/toolbars specifically for print. The RichCellEditor file is truncated, so print-specific handling cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: AI question generation/preferences workflow and related UI behaviors (generate/edit/select/add to bank/paper).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest focuses on theme + table/match-pairs editing, inline images, sizing, print safety, and persistence.

hallucinated_features.description: OCR review/approve flow changes and UI for selecting extracted questions.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; outside scope of table/match-pairs editor and theme changes.

hallucinated_features.description: Question entry autosave draft storage with undo/redo controls.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest does not mention drafts, autosave, or undo/redo for question entry.

hallucinated_features.description: Multiple general navigation/app shell behaviors (storage error screen/recovery UI, coachmark overlay integration changes).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest does not ask for initialization error UX or coachmark fixes.

hallucinated_features.description: Login screen behavior changes including Guest mode and messaging about cloud storage.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest explicitly notes non-goals around new auth providers and focuses on editor/theme changes.
